content.full_text:
Legal Division.
California Fair Political Commission
42E J Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento Ca. 95804-0807
Atg. 12,1992.
FPPC
AUG 1 4 Bg2
Dear Sir:
I am a candidate in a school board tnrstee election. It is my intention to obey the
election laws. I have asked the county elections clerk these questions and they did
not know the answers. I was told to write you and request you to answer these
questions with in twenty one days.
The questions are:
1) Can one candidate pass out sampaign literature for another candidate? Does
this require any form or report to be filed?
2) The city of San Luis Obispo Ca. has a street fair farmers market on Thursdays
in the evening. Several of the school board candidates are considering renting a
booth together at this weekly event. The rent is fifteen dollars. We each would
pay five dollars of this rent. Can we legally share these expenses? Does this
require any form or report to be filed?
3) I am not accepting campaign donations. Is it permissible if I suggest to my
supporters that any donations they would have contributed to me could be used by
another candidate whom I name? Does this require any form or report to be
filed?
I would appreciate your written response as quickly as possible. Thank you.
Sincerely;
z
/),,
Rbbert F. Wieser
573 Woodland Dr.,
Los Osos Ca.93402
805-528-2068
